locations.description: Vancouver is a bustling west coast seaport in British Columbia, surrounded by mountains and offering a blend of urban sophistication and outdoor adventure.

food.name: Pacific Salmon
food.description: Fresh wild salmon, often cedar-planked or candied, a regional icon.

food.name: Japadog
food.description: Japanese-style hot dogs with unique toppings like terimayo and nori.

food.name: Nanaimo Bar
food.description: A no-bake layered dessert with chocolate, custard, and coconut-graham crust.

attractions.name: Stanley Park
attractions.description: A 400-hectare urban park with the famous Seawall, beaches, and old-growth forest.

attractions.name: Granville Island
attractions.description: A vibrant public market, artisan studios, and waterfront dining hub.

attractions.name: Capilano Suspension Bridge
attractions.description: A 137m bridge suspended 70m above the Capilano River canyon.

locations.travel_tips: Public transit (SkyTrain) is efficient. Rain gear is essential outside summer months. Taxis and ride-sharing are plentiful downtown.

locations.description: Barcelona is a cosmopolitan Mediterranean city known for Gaudí's architecture, vibrant street life, and world-class cuisine.

food.name: Paella
food.description: Traditional saffron rice dish with seafood, a Catalan staple.

food.name: Patatas Bravas
food.description: Crispy fried potato cubes served with spicy tomato sauce and aioli.

food.name: Crema Catalana
food.description: A creamy custard dessert with a caramelized sugar crust, similar to crème brûlée.

attractions.name: Sagrada Familia
attractions.description: Gaudí's unfinished masterpiece basilica, under construction since 1882.

attractions.name: Park Güell
attractions.description: A whimsical public park with Gaudí's colorful mosaic benches and structures.

attractions.name: La Rambla
attractions.description: Barcelona's iconic tree-lined pedestrian boulevard with shops and street performers.

locations.travel_tips: December weather is mild (10–15°C). Metro is excellent; get a T-10 travel card. Watch for pickpockets in tourist areas.

locations.description: Singapore is a futuristic city-state blending Chinese, Malay, and Indian cultures with world-class dining and stunning architecture.
locations.best_season: February to April, July to September

food.name: Hainanese Chicken Rice
food.description: Poached chicken with fragrant rice cooked in chicken stock, served with chili and ginger sauce.

food.name: Chili Crab
food.description: Stir-fried crab in a thick, sweet-savory tomato chili sauce, a national dish.

food.name: Laksa
food.description: Spicy coconut-based noodle soup with shrimp, fish cake, and bean sprouts.

attractions.name: Gardens by the Bay
attractions.description: Futuristic nature park with iconic Supertree Grove and climate-controlled conservatories.

attractions.name: Marina Bay Sands
attractions.description: Iconic integrated resort with the world's largest rooftop infinity pool and sky park.

attractions.name: Hawker Centers
attractions.description: Open-air food courts offering affordable Michelin-starred street food.

locations.travel_tips: MRT is the best way to get around. August is hot and humid (30°C+). Tap water is safe to drink. English is widely spoken.

locations.description: Honolulu, on Oahu Island, is Hawaii's capital and gateway to the islands, known for its iconic Waikiki Beach and rich Polynesian culture.

food.name: Poke
food.description: Fresh raw ahi tuna cubed and seasoned with shoyu, sesame oil, and seaweed.

food.name: Loco Moco
food.description: White rice topped with a hamburger patty, fried egg, and brown gravy.

food.name: Shave Ice
food.description: Finely shaved ice drenched in tropical fruit syrups, often with azuki beans and ice cream.

attractions.name: Waikiki Beach
attractions.description: Iconic crescent beach with calm waters, Diamond Head backdrop, and surf culture.

attractions.name: Diamond Head
attractions.description: A volcanic tuff cone with a hiking trail offering panoramic views of Honolulu.

attractions.name: Pearl Harbor
attractions.description: Historic WWII memorial site including the USS Arizona Memorial.

locations.travel_tips: TheBus system covers the island affordably. June is peak summer with minimal rain. Reef-safe sunscreen is required by law.

locations.description: New Orleans is a vibrant Louisiana city known for its French Quarter, jazz music, and Mardi Gras celebrations.

food.name: Gumbo
food.description: A rich stew with meat or seafood, okra, and the Cajun holy trinity.

attractions.name: French Quarter
attractions.description: Historic district with cast-iron balconies and Bourbon Street.

locations.description: San Diego is a sunny coastal city in Southern California known for its beaches, Balboa Park, and laid-back culture.

food.name: Fish Tacos
food.description: Battered white fish in corn tortillas with cabbage slaw and crema.

attractions.name: Balboa Park
attractions.description: 1,200-acre cultural park with museums, gardens, and the San Diego Zoo.

locations.description: Seattle is a Pacific Northwest tech hub surrounded by water, mountains, and evergreen forests.

food.name: Salmon Chowder
food.description: Creamy seafood chowder with wild Pacific salmon, a Seattle classic.

attractions.name: Pike Place Market
attractions.description: Iconic waterfront market with flying fish, local crafts, and the original Starbucks.

locations.description: Nashville, Music City, is Tennessee's capital known for its vibrant live music scene and Southern hospitality.

food.name: Hot Chicken
food.description: Cayenne-spiced fried chicken, a fiery Nashville specialty.

attractions.name: Broadway
attractions.description: Iconic strip of honky-tonk bars with live country music all day.

locations.description: Bangkok is Thailand's vibrant capital, blending ornate temples, bustling street markets, and a world-renowned food scene.

food.name: Pad Thai
food.description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, bean sprouts, and tamarind sauce.

attractions.name: Grand Palace
attractions.description: The former royal residence with the sacred Temple of the Emerald Buddha.

locations.description: Vienna, Austria's imperial capital, is renowned for its classical music heritage, coffee house culture, and baroque architecture.

food.name: Wiener Schnitzel
food.description: Thin breaded veal cutlet, a classic Viennese dish served with lemon.

attractions.name: Schönbrunn Palace
attractions.description: Baroque imperial summer residence with ornate rooms and vast gardens.
